prompt: Add two new cache-habit rules to @prune/cache-habits: CH-013 flags a stateful-to-stateless transport regression (a session that had been on a stateful transport reverting to stateless full re-sends), and CH-014 advises when a long-running stateless-transport session would benefit from switching to a stateful transport. Wire them into the linter so they surface like the existing rules. The package's test suite currently has failing tests specifying the exact expected behavior.
oracleCmd: npx vitest run src/rules.test.ts src/edge-cases.test.ts src/linter.test.ts
notes: Reference: feat(cache-habits) CH-013/CH-014 2026-06-07. Feature-against-test-spec; oracle restricted to the cache-habits package.
